description: Control UI HTTP endpoints - serves the web-based control interface and avatar assets
NOTE: Avatar route is `{basePath}/__carapace_avatar__/{agent_id}` (see src/server/http.rs:1147-1150). The basePath prefix is load-bearing: the SPA fallback at `control_ui_static` dispatches on the literal `__carapace_avatar__/` prefix inside the basePath-gated route. Scenarios below that omit the basePath are illustrative only; the actual runtime path ALWAYS includes the active basePath, which defaults to `/ui` (when `gateway.controlUi.basePath` is unset or empty, `register_admin_routes` substitutes the literal `/ui`). Config keys live under `gateway.controlUi.*`, NOT `gateway.http.controlUi.*`.

ui_root.description: Control UI SPA serving. `gateway.controlUi.basePath` is a configurable string; when unset or empty, `register_admin_routes` (src/server/http.rs:1138-1142) substitutes the literal `/ui` as the active prefix.

avatar.description: Agent avatar image or metadata endpoint (basePath-gated)

notes: Control UI assets must be built with 'pnpm ui:build'
Base path configurable via gateway.controlUi.basePath (defaults to '/ui' when unset or empty)
SPA fallback: unknown paths serve index.html for client-side routing
Avatar endpoint serves local files or returns metadata JSON

Avatar route is basePath-gated and always includes the active basePath: with basePath='/ui' (the default-substituted value when config is unset/empty) the URL is '/ui/__carapace_avatar__/<agent>'. A truly-empty basePath is not reachable at the HTTP layer.

notes: Use ?meta=1 to get the remote URL instead
